note: Sincere is mostly CONTINUOUS singing after the intro — minimal tacet (unlike Lida). Tacet = intro mm1-3 + brief m14. Clip order 01..10 maps to consecutive sung phrases below.

tacet.reason: intro — HAROLD pitch-pipe + spoken dialogue (JACEY/OLIN/HAROLD), no baritone
3/4 meter change — OLIVER measure rest before the 'Any-' pickup

phrases.lyric: Ice Cream. Ice Cream. Ice Cream.—
—An-y… Sin in "sin-cere"? Where is the good in "good-
bye"? In "good-bye"? Your ap-pre-hen-sions con-fuse me,
dear, puz-zle and mys-ti-fy. Mys-t-ify… Tell me,
What can be fair in "fare-well",— dear, while
How can there be an-y sin in "sin-cere"?
Aren't we sin-cere-ly in love? Oh, we're in love. (molto ritard, 4/4, fermata cadence)
phrases.note: final phrase likely spans clips 09 and 10 (21 notes) — confirm split at R2
